staticText: Deterministic browser-local business-name shortlist workshop in English, French and Swahili. It combines up to five user-supplied keywords, an optional user-supplied local word, selected industry, audience, tone, pattern and length target through fixed reusable patterns. The transparent readability heuristic checks only length target, one-or-two-word form, keyword connection, triple repeated characters and simple characters. It is not a measure of commercial quality, uniqueness, registrability or legal safety. AfroTools supplies no translation, linguistic meaning, company-name availability, trademark clearance, domain availability, social-handle availability or official registry result. The working shortlist is session-only, is not persisted or sent to a server, and can be copied or exported locally as CSV, JSON, PDF or print. The AI manifest is route-only and accepts no name brief or prefill data.
